subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that the ocean hath surged, and the fragrance hath wafted, and the light hath shone forth, and the fire hath raised its call, and the sun hath spoken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله ان البحر ماج و العرف هاج و النور اشرق و النار نادت و الشمس تکلمت و
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God
